name: Oblique Landing Valve — 63 mm
shortDescription: Gunmetal hydrant outlet valve for wet and dry riser systems.
longDescription: The landing valve is the controlled outlet where firefighters connect to a building's riser. Manufactured in gunmetal with an oblique body to ease hose connection in confined riser cupboards, supplied with blank cap and chain, and pressure-tested before dispatch.

images.alt: Oblique Landing Valve — 63 mm supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
